scripts.generate: sh -c 'if [ -z "${DATABASE_URL:-}" ]; then if [ -f ../../.env ]; then set -a && . ../../.env && set +a; elif [ -f ../../.env.example ]; then set -a && . ../../.env.example && set +a; fi; fi; prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma'
scripts.migrate: sh -c 'if [ -z "${DATABASE_URL:-}" ]; then if [ -f ../../.env ]; then set -a && . ../../.env && set +a; fi; : "${DATABASE_URL:?DATABASE_URL is required for database migrations}"; fi; prisma migrate dev --schema prisma/schema.prisma'
scripts.seed: sh -c 'if [ -z "${DATABASE_URL:-}" ]; then if [ -f ../../.env ]; then set -a && . ../../.env && set +a; fi; : "${DATABASE_URL:?DATABASE_URL is required for database seeds}"; fi; tsx prisma/seed.ts'
scripts.check: sh -c 'biome check --config-path "$(realpath ../../biome.json)" src prisma && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit'
